case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. STEVE BERRONES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100201612) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERRONES, STEVE $2,642.19 PRINCIPAL, $314.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,956.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100201612)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68213005) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BERRONES, STEVE DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-03-2023
